description: Reconcile bank statement CSV with open invoices in Tripletex
endpoints: PUT /invoice/{id}/:payment — register payment on matched invoice
common_errors: CSV file may be empty (content_base64='' from platform) — handle gracefully
Invoice numbers in bank statement may not match Tripletex invoice IDs — match by amount
Partial payments: register the partial amount, not the full invoice amount
tips: IMPORTANT: If CSV file is empty, use discover_sandbox to find open invoices and register payments based on prompt context. CRITICAL: Invoice IDs in the bank statement (like 1001, 1002) are INVOICE NUMBERS, not Tripletex internal IDs. You MUST first GET /invoice to find the real Tripletex ID for each invoice number, then use that ID in register_payment. Never pass raw invoice numbers as IDs to PUT /invoice/{id}/:payment. For matching: GET open invoices, match by invoiceNumber or amount, then register_payment with the Tripletex internal ID.
